28→    val properties = HashMap<String, Any?>()
29→    if (!postData.isLocalDraft) {
30→        properties["post_id"] = postData.remotePostId
31→    }
32→
33→    properties["action"] = when (buttonType) {
34→        BUTTON_EDIT -> {
35→            properties[AnalyticsUtils.HAS_GUTENBERG_BLOCKS_KEY] = PostUtils
36→                .contentContainsGutenbergBlocks(postData.content)
37→            "edit"
38→        }
39→        BUTTON_RETRY -> "retry"
40→        BUTTON_SUBMIT -> "submit"
41→        BUTTON_VIEW -> "view"
42→        BUTTON_PREVIEW -> "preview"
43→        BUTTON_STATS -> "stats"
44→        BUTTON_TRASH -> "trash"
45→        BUTTON_COPY -> "copy"
46→        BUTTON_DELETE,
47→        BUTTON_DELETE_PERMANENTLY -> "delete"
48→        BUTTON_PUBLISH -> "publish"
49→        BUTTON_SYNC -> "sync"
50→        BUTTON_MORE -> "more"
51→        BUTTON_MOVE_TO_DRAFT -> "move_to_draft"
52→        BUTTON_CANCEL_PENDING_AUTO_UPLOAD -> "cancel_pending_auto_upload"
53→        BUTTON_SHOW_MOVE_TRASHED_POST_TO_DRAFT_DIALOG -> "show_move_trashed_post_to_draft_post_dialog"

55→        BUTTON_PROMOTE_WITH_BLAZE -> "promote_with_blaze"
56→    }
57→
58→    AnalyticsUtils.trackWithSiteDetails(statsEvent, site, properties)

 41→
 42→const val POST_LIST_ICON_PADDING = 8
 43→const val MAX_TITLE_EXCERPT_LINES = 2
 44→
 45→sealed class PostListItemViewHolder(
 46→    @LayoutRes layout: Int,
 47→    parent: ViewGroup,
 48→    private val imageManager: ImageManager,
 49→    private val uiHelpers: UiHelpers
 50→) : RecyclerView.ViewHolder(LayoutInflater.from(parent.context).inflate(layout, parent, false)) {
 51→    private val featuredImageView: ImageView = itemView.findViewById(R.id.image_featured)
 52→    private val titleTextView: TextView = itemView.findViewById(R.id.title)
 53→    private val postInfoTextView: TextView = itemView.findViewById(R.id.post_info)
 54→    private val statusesTextView: TextView = itemView.findViewById(R.id.statuses_label)
 55→    private val uploadProgressBar: ProgressBar = itemView.findViewById(R.id.upload_progress)
 56→    private val disabledOverlay: FrameLayout = itemView.findViewById(R.id.disabled_overlay)
 57→    private val container: ConstraintLayout = itemView.findViewById(R.id.container)
 58→    private val excerptTextView: TextView = itemView.findViewById(R.id.excerpt)
 59→    private val moreButton: ImageView = itemView.findViewById(R.id.more)
 60→
 61→    private val selectableBackground: Drawable? = parent.context.getDrawableFromAttribute(
 62→        AndroidR.attr.selectableItemBackground
 63→    )
 64→
 65→    private val noTitle = UiString.UiStringRes(R.string.untitled_in_parentheses)
 66→    /**
 67→     * Url of an image loaded in the `featuredImageView`.
 68→     */
 69→    private var loadedFeaturedImgUrl: String? = null
 70→
 71→    companion object {
 72→        var isClickEnabled = AtomicBoolean(true)
 73→    }
 74→
 75→    abstract fun onBind(item: PostListItemUiState)
 76→
 77→    class Standard(
 78→        parent: ViewGroup,
 79→        imageManager: ImageManager,
 80→        uiHelpers: UiHelpers
 81→    ) : PostListItemViewHolder(R.layout.post_list_item, parent, imageManager, uiHelpers) {
 82→        override fun onBind(item: PostListItemUiState) {
 83→            setBasicValues(item.data)
 84→            setMoreActions(item.moreActions.actions)
 85→
 86→            itemView.setOnClickListener {
 87→                if (isSafeClick(it)) {
 88→                    item.onSelected.invoke()
 89→                }
 90→            }
 91→        }
 92→
 93→        // Purpose of this method is to prevent 2 Editors
 94→        // from being launched simultaneously and then producing a crash
 95→        private fun isSafeClick(view: View): Boolean {
 96→            if (isClickEnabled.getAndSet(false)) {
 97→                view.postDelayed({
 98→                    isClickEnabled.set(true)
 99→                }, 1000)
100→                return true
101→            }
102→            return false
103→        }
104→    }
105→
106→    protected fun setBasicValues(data: PostListItemUiStateData) {
107→        uiHelpers.setTextOrHide(titleTextView, data.title)
108→        uiHelpers.setTextOrHide(excerptTextView, data.excerpt)
109→        updatePostInfoLabel(postInfoTextView, data.postInfo)
110→        uiHelpers.updateVisibility(statusesTextView, data.statuses.isNotEmpty())
111→        updateStatusesLabel(statusesTextView, data.statuses, data.statusesDelimiter, data.statusesColor)
112→        showFeaturedImage(data.imageUrl)
113→        updateProgressBarState(data.progressBarUiState)
114→        uiHelpers.updateVisibility(disabledOverlay, data.showOverlay)
115→        if (data.disableRippleEffect) {
116→            container.background = null
117→        } else {
118→            container.background = selectableBackground
119→        }
120→
121→        if ((data.title != null && data.title != noTitle) && data.excerpt != null) {
122→            titleTextView.maxLines = MAX_TITLE_EXCERPT_LINES
123→            excerptTextView.maxLines = MAX_TITLE_EXCERPT_LINES
124→            titleTextView.viewTreeObserver.addOnPreDrawListener(object : ViewTreeObserver.OnPreDrawListener {
125→                override fun onPreDraw(): Boolean {
126→                    // Remove the listener to avoid multiple callbacks
127→                    titleTextView.viewTreeObserver.removeOnPreDrawListener(this)
128→
129→                    // Get the layout of the title text
130→                    val titleLayout = titleTextView.layout
131→
132→                    // Check if the title occupies more than 2 lines
133→                    when (titleLayout.lineCount) {
134→                        1 -> {
135→                            excerptTextView.maxLines = 2
136→                        }
137→                        else -> {
138→                            excerptTextView.maxLines = 1
139→                            titleTextView.maxLines = 2
140→                        }
141→                    }
142→                    return true
143→                }
144→            })
145→        }
146→    }
147→
148→    protected fun setMoreActions(actions: List<PostListItemAction>) {
149→        moreButton.expandTouchTargetArea(R.dimen.post_list_more_button_extra_padding)
150→        moreButton.setOnClickListener { onMoreClicked(actions, moreButton) }
151→    }
152→
153→    private fun updatePostInfoLabel(view: TextView, uiStrings: List<UiString>?) {
154→        val concatenatedText = uiStrings?.joinToString(separator = "  ·  ") {
155→            uiHelpers.getTextOfUiString(view.context, it)
156→        }
157→        uiHelpers.setTextOrHide(view, concatenatedText)
158→    }
159→
160→    protected fun onMoreClicked(actions: List<PostListItemAction>, v: View) {
161→        val menu = PopupMenu(v.context, v)
162→        actions.forEach { singleItemAction ->
163→            val menuItem = menu.menu.add(
164→                Menu.NONE,
165→                singleItemAction.buttonType.value,
166→                Menu.NONE,
167→                getMenuItemTitleWithIcon(v.context, singleItemAction)
168→            )
169→            menuItem.setOnMenuItemClickListener {
170→                singleItemAction.onButtonClicked.invoke(singleItemAction.buttonType)
171→                true
172→            }
173→        }
174→        menu.show()
175→    }
176→
177→    private fun updateProgressBarState(progressBarUiState: ProgressBarUiState) {
178→        uiHelpers.updateVisibility(uploadProgressBar, progressBarUiState.visibility)
179→        when (progressBarUiState) {
180→            is ProgressBarUiState.Indeterminate -> uploadProgressBar.isIndeterminate = true
181→            is ProgressBarUiState.Determinate -> {
182→                uploadProgressBar.isIndeterminate = false
183→                uploadProgressBar.progress = progressBarUiState.progress
184→            }
185→            is ProgressBarUiState.Hidden -> Unit // Do nothing
186→        }
187→    }
188→
189→    private fun updateStatusesLabel(
190→        view: TextView,
191→        statuses: List<UiString>,
192→        delimiter: UiString,
193→        @ColorRes color: Int?
194→    ) {
195→        val separator = uiHelpers.getTextOfUiString(view.context, delimiter)
196→        view.text = statuses.joinToString(separator) { uiHelpers.getTextOfUiString(view.context, it) }
197→        color?.let { statusColor ->
198→            view.setTextColor(
199→                ContextCompat.getColor(
200→                    itemView.context,
201→                    statusColor
202→                )
203→            )
204→        }
205→    }
206→
207→    private fun showFeaturedImage(imageUrl: String?) {
208→        if (!imageUrl.isNullOrBlank() && imageUrl == loadedFeaturedImgUrl) {
209→            // Suppress blinking as the media upload progresses
210→            return
211→        }
212→        if (imageUrl.isNullOrBlank()) {
213→            featuredImageView.visibility = View.GONE
214→            imageManager.cancelRequestAndClearImageView(featuredImageView)
215→        } else {
216→            featuredImageView.visibility = View.VISIBLE
217→            imageManager.loadImageWithCorners(
218→                featuredImageView,
219→                ImageType.PHOTO_ROUNDED_CORNERS,
220→                imageUrl,
221→                uiHelpers.getPxOfUiDimen(
222→                    WordPress.getContext(),
223→                    UiDimen.UIDimenRes(R.dimen.my_site_post_item_image_corner_radius)
224→                )
225→            )
226→        }
227→        loadedFeaturedImgUrl = imageUrl
228→    }
229→
230→    private fun setTint(context: Context, drawable: Drawable, color: Int): Drawable {
231→        val wrappedDrawable: Drawable = DrawableCompat.wrap(drawable)
232→        if (color != 0) {
233→            val iconColor = context.getColorFromAttribute(color)
234→            DrawableCompat.setTint(wrappedDrawable, iconColor)
235→        }
236→        return wrappedDrawable
237→    }
238→
239→    @Suppress("ComplexMethod")
240→    private fun getMenuItemTitleWithIcon(context: Context, item: PostListItemAction): SpannableStringBuilder {
241→        var icon: Drawable? = setTint(
242→            context,
243→            ContextCompat.getDrawable(context, item.buttonType.iconResId)!!, item.buttonType.colorAttrId
244→        )
245→        // If there's no icon, we insert a transparent one to keep the title aligned with the items which have icons.
246→        if (icon == null) icon = ColorDrawable(Color.TRANSPARENT)
247→        val iconSize: Int = context.resources.getDimensionPixelSize(R.dimen.menu_item_icon_size)
248→        icon.setBounds(0, 0, iconSize, iconSize)
249→        val imageSpan = ImageSpan(icon)
250→
251→        // Add a space placeholder for the icon, before the title.
252→        val menuTitle = context.getText(item.buttonType.textResId)
253→        val ssb = SpannableStringBuilder(
254→            menuTitle.padStart(menuTitle.length + POST_LIST_ICON_PADDING)
255→        )
256→
257→        // Replace the space placeholder with the icon.
258→        ssb.setSpan(imageSpan, 1, 2, 0)
259→        return ssb
260→    }
261→}
262→

190→    private fun getPostInfoLabels(

194→        authorFilterSelection: AuthorFilterSelection,
195→        isSearch: Boolean,

197→    ): List<UiString> {
198→        val uiStrings: MutableList<UiString> = mutableListOf()
199→
200→        if (isSearch) {
201→            val postStatusText = when (postStatus) {
202→                UNKNOWN -> R.string.unknown
203→                PUBLISHED -> R.string.post_status_post_published
204→                DRAFT -> R.string.post_status_draft
205→                PRIVATE -> R.string.post_status_post_private
206→                PENDING -> R.string.post_status_pending_review
207→                TRASHED -> R.string.post_status_post_trashed
208→                SCHEDULED -> R.string.post_status_post_scheduled
209→            }

211→        }

213→        if (formattedDate.isNotBlank()) {
214→            uiStrings.add(UiStringText(formattedDate))
215→        }
216→        if (isAuthorFilterVisible && authorFilterSelection == EVERYONE && !displayName.isNullOrBlank()) {
217→            uiStrings.add(UiStringText(displayName))

222→    private fun getTitle(post: PostModel): UiString {
223→        return if (post.title.isNotBlank()) {
224→            UiStringText(StringEscapeUtils.unescapeHtml4(post.title).let { HtmlUtils.stripHtml(it) })
225→        } else UiStringRes(R.string.untitled_in_parentheses)
226→    }

228→    private fun getExcerpt(post: PostModel): UiString? =
229→        PostUtils.getPostListExcerptFromPost(post)
230→            .takeIf { !it.isNullOrBlank() }
231→            ?.let { StringEscapeUtils.unescapeHtml4(it) }
232→            ?.let { PostUtils.collapseShortcodes(it) }
233→            ?.let { UiStringText(getTextBeforeLargeSpaceGap(it)) }
234→    private fun getTextBeforeLargeSpaceGap(input: String): String {
235→        val parts = input.split(Regex("\\s+\\n+"))
236→        return parts.first()
237→    }

239→    private fun getProgressBarState(
240→        uploadUiState: PostUploadUiState,
241→        performingCriticalAction: Boolean
242→    ): ProgressBarUiState {
243→        return if (shouldShowProgress(uploadUiState, performingCriticalAction)) {
244→            if (uploadUiState is UploadingMedia) {
245→                ProgressBarUiState.Determinate(uploadUiState.progress)
246→            } else {
247→                ProgressBarUiState.Indeterminate

250→            ProgressBarUiState.Hidden

254→    private fun shouldShowProgress(uploadUiState: PostUploadUiState, performingCriticalAction: Boolean): Boolean {
255→        return performingCriticalAction || uploadUiState is UploadingPost || uploadUiState is UploadingMedia ||
256→                uploadUiState is UploadQueued

259→    private fun getErrorAndProgressStatuses(
260→        uploadUiState: PostUploadUiState,
261→        postStatus: PostStatus,
262→        hasUnhandledConflicts: Boolean,
263→        hasAutoSave: Boolean
264→    ): MutableList<UiString> {
265→        val labels: MutableList<UiString> = ArrayList()
266→        when {
267→            uploadUiState is UploadFailed -> {
268→                getErrorLabel(uploadUiState, postStatus).let { labels.add(it) }
269→            }
270→
271→            uploadUiState is UploadingPost -> if (uploadUiState.isDraft) {
272→                labels.add(UiStringRes(R.string.post_uploading_draft))
273→            } else {
274→                labels.add(UiStringRes(R.string.post_uploading))
275→            }
276→
277→            uploadUiState is UploadingMedia -> labels.add(UiStringRes(R.string.uploading_media))
278→            uploadUiState is UploadQueued -> labels.add(UiStringRes(R.string.post_queued))
279→            uploadUiState is UploadWaitingForConnection -> {
280→                getWaitingForConnectionStatus(uploadUiState.postStatus)?.let {
281→                    labels.add(it)
282→                }
283→            }
284→
285→            hasUnhandledConflicts -> labels.add(UiStringRes(R.string.local_post_is_conflicted))
286→            hasAutoSave -> labels.add(UiStringRes(R.string.local_post_autosave_revision_available))
287→        }
288→        return labels
289→    }
290→
291→    private fun getWaitingForConnectionStatus(postStatus: PostStatus): UiString? {
292→        return when (postStatus) {
293→            UNKNOWN, PUBLISHED -> (UiStringRes(R.string.post_waiting_for_connection_publish))
294→            PRIVATE -> (UiStringRes(R.string.post_waiting_for_connection_private))
295→            PENDING -> (UiStringRes(R.string.post_waiting_for_connection_pending))
296→            SCHEDULED -> (UiStringRes(R.string.post_waiting_for_connection_scheduled))
297→            DRAFT -> (UiStringRes(R.string.post_waiting_for_connection_draft))
298→            TRASHED -> {
299→                AppLog.e(
300→                    POSTS,
301→                    "Developer error: This state shouldn't happen. Trashed post is in " +
302→                            "UploadWaitingForConnection state."
303→                )
304→                return null
305→            }
306→        }
307→    }
308→
309→    private fun getStatuses(
310→        postStatus: PostStatus,
311→        post: PostModel,
312→        uploadUiState: PostUploadUiState,
313→        hasUnhandledConflicts: Boolean,
314→        hasAutoSave: Boolean
315→    ): List<UiString> {
316→        val labels = getErrorAndProgressStatuses(
317→            uploadUiState,
318→            postStatus,
319→            hasUnhandledConflicts,
320→            hasAutoSave
321→        )
322→
323→        // we want to show either single error/progress label or 0-n info labels.
324→        if (labels.isEmpty()) {
325→            if (post.isLocalDraft) {
326→                labels.add(UiStringRes(R.string.local_draft))
327→            } else if (post.isLocallyChanged) {
328→                labels.add(UiStringRes(R.string.local_changes))
329→            }
330→            if (postStatus == PRIVATE) {
331→                labels.add(UiStringRes(R.string.post_status_post_private))
332→            }
333→            if (postStatus == PENDING) {
334→                labels.add(UiStringRes(R.string.post_status_pending_review))
335→            }
336→            if (post.sticky) {
337→                labels.add(UiStringRes(R.string.post_status_sticky))
338→            }
339→        }
340→        return labels
341→    }
342→
343→    private fun getErrorLabel(uploadUiState: UploadFailed, postStatus: PostStatus): UiString {
344→        return when {
345→            uploadUiState.error.mediaError != null -> getMediaUploadErrorMessage(uploadUiState, postStatus)
346→            uploadUiState.error.postError != null -> UploadUtils.getErrorMessageResIdFromPostError(
347→                postStatus,
348→                false,
349→                uploadUiState.error.postError,
350→                uploadUiState.isEligibleForAutoUpload
351→            )
352→
353→            else -> {
354→                val errorMsg = "MediaError and postError are both null."
355→                if (BuildConfig.DEBUG) {
356→                    throw IllegalStateException(errorMsg)
357→                } else {
358→                    AppLog.e(POSTS, errorMsg)
359→                }
360→                UiStringRes(R.string.error_generic)
361→            }
362→        }
363→    }
364→
365→    private fun getMediaUploadErrorMessage(uploadUiState: UploadFailed, postStatus: PostStatus): UiStringRes {
366→        return when {
367→            uploadUiState.isEligibleForAutoUpload -> when (postStatus) {
368→                PUBLISHED -> UiStringRes(R.string.error_media_recover_post_not_published_retrying)
369→                PRIVATE -> UiStringRes(R.string.error_media_recover_post_not_published_retrying_private)
370→                SCHEDULED -> UiStringRes(R.string.error_media_recover_post_not_scheduled_retrying)
371→                PENDING -> UiStringRes(R.string.error_media_recover_post_not_submitted_retrying)
372→                DRAFT, TRASHED, UNKNOWN -> UiStringRes(R.string.error_generic_error_retrying)
373→            }
374→
375→            uploadUiState.retryWillPushChanges -> when (postStatus) {
376→                PUBLISHED -> UiStringRes(R.string.error_media_recover_post_not_published)
377→                PRIVATE -> UiStringRes(R.string.error_media_recover_post_not_published_private)
378→                SCHEDULED -> UiStringRes(R.string.error_media_recover_post_not_scheduled)
379→                PENDING -> UiStringRes(R.string.error_media_recover_post_not_submitted)
380→                DRAFT, TRASHED, UNKNOWN -> UiStringRes(R.string.error_media_recover_post)
381→            }
382→
383→            else -> UiStringRes(R.string.error_media_recover_post)
384→        }
385→    }
386→
387→    private fun shouldShowOverlay(uploadUiState: PostUploadUiState, performingCriticalAction: Boolean): Boolean {
388→        // show overlay when post upload is in progress or (media upload is in progress and the user is not using Aztec)
389→        return performingCriticalAction ||
390→                (uploadUiState is UploadingPost ||
391→                        (!appPrefsWrapper.isAztecEditorEnabled && uploadUiState is UploadingMedia))
392→    }
393→
394→    @Suppress("LongParameterList", "ComplexMethod")
395→    private fun createButtonTypes(
396→        postStatus: PostStatus,
397→        isLocalDraft: Boolean,
398→        isLocallyChanged: Boolean,
399→        uploadUiState: PostUploadUiState,
400→        siteHasCapabilitiesToPublish: Boolean,
401→        statsSupported: Boolean,
402→        shouldShowStatsInJetpackRemovalPhase: Boolean,
403→        shouldShowPromoteWithBlaze: Boolean
404→    ): List<PostListButtonType> {
405→        val canRetryUpload = uploadUiState is UploadFailed
406→        val canCancelPendingAutoUpload = (uploadUiState is UploadWaitingForConnection ||
407→                (uploadUiState is UploadFailed && uploadUiState.isEligibleForAutoUpload))
408→        val canPublishPost = (canRetryUpload || uploadUiState is NothingToUpload || !canCancelPendingAutoUpload) &&
409→                (isLocallyChanged || isLocalDraft || postStatus == DRAFT ||
410→                        (siteHasCapabilitiesToPublish && postStatus == PENDING))
411→
412→        val canShowStats = statsSupported &&
413→                postStatus == PUBLISHED &&
414→                !isLocalDraft &&
415→                !isLocallyChanged &&
416→                shouldShowStatsInJetpackRemovalPhase
417→        val canShowCopy = postStatus == PUBLISHED || postStatus == DRAFT
418→        val canShowCopyUrlButton = !isLocalDraft && postStatus != TRASHED
419→        val canShowViewButton = !canRetryUpload && postStatus != TRASHED
420→        val canShowPublishButton = canRetryUpload || canPublishPost
421→        val buttonTypes = ArrayList<PostListButtonType>()
422→
423→        if (postStatus != TRASHED) {
424→            buttonTypes.add(BUTTON_EDIT)
425→        }
426→
427→        if (canCancelPendingAutoUpload) {
428→            buttonTypes.add(BUTTON_CANCEL_PENDING_AUTO_UPLOAD)
429→        }
430→
431→        if (canShowPublishButton) {
432→            buttonTypes.add(
433→                when {
434→                    canRetryUpload -> BUTTON_RETRY
435→                    !siteHasCapabilitiesToPublish -> BUTTON_SUBMIT
436→                    postStatus == SCHEDULED && isLocallyChanged -> BUTTON_SYNC
437→                    else -> BUTTON_PUBLISH
438→                }
439→            )
440→        }
441→
442→        if (canShowViewButton) {
443→            buttonTypes.addViewOrPreviewAction(isLocalDraft || isLocallyChanged)
444→        }
445→
446→        if (canShowStats) {
447→            buttonTypes.add(BUTTON_STATS)
448→        }
449→
450→        if (canShowCopy) {
451→            buttonTypes.add(BUTTON_COPY)
452→        }
453→
454→        buttonTypes.addMoveToDraftActionIfAvailable(postStatus)
455→
456→        if (canShowCopyUrlButton) {
457→            buttonTypes.add(BUTTON_COPY_URL)
458→        }
459→
460→        if (shouldShowPromoteWithBlaze) {
461→            buttonTypes.add(BUTTON_PROMOTE_WITH_BLAZE)
462→        }
463→
464→        buttonTypes.addDeletingOrTrashAction(isLocalDraft, postStatus)
465→
466→        return buttonTypes
467→    }
468→
469→    private fun MutableList<PostListButtonType>.addViewOrPreviewAction(shouldShowPreview: Boolean) {
470→        add(if (shouldShowPreview) BUTTON_PREVIEW else BUTTON_VIEW)
471→    }
472→
473→    private fun MutableList<PostListButtonType>.addDeletingOrTrashAction(
474→        isLocalDraft: Boolean,
475→        postStatus: PostStatus
476→    ) {
477→        when {
478→            isLocalDraft -> add(BUTTON_DELETE)
479→            postStatus == TRASHED -> add(BUTTON_DELETE_PERMANENTLY)
480→            postStatus != TRASHED -> add(BUTTON_TRASH)
481→        }
482→    }
483→
484→    private fun MutableList<PostListButtonType>.addMoveToDraftActionIfAvailable(postStatus: PostStatus) {
485→        val canMovePostToDraft = postStatus == PUBLISHED || postStatus == TRASHED
486→
487→        if (canMovePostToDraft) {
488→            add(BUTTON_MOVE_TO_DRAFT)
489→        }
490→    }
491→
492→    private fun createMoreActions(
493→        buttonTypes: List<PostListButtonType>,
494→        onButtonClicked: (PostListButtonType) -> Unit
495→    ): PostListItemAction.MoreItem {
496→        val allItems = buttonTypes.map { buttonType: PostListButtonType ->
497→            PostListItemAction.SingleItem(buttonType, onButtonClicked)
498→        }
499→        return PostListItemAction.MoreItem(allItems, onButtonClicked)
500→    }
501→}

 4→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.model.post.PostStatus
 5→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.model.post.PostStatus.PRIVATE
 6→
 7→enum class PostListType(val postStatuses: List<PostStatus>) {
 8→    PUBLISHED(listOf(PostStatus.PUBLISHED, PRIVATE)),
 9→    DRAFTS(listOf(PostStatus.DRAFT, PostStatus.PENDING)),
10→    SCHEDULED(listOf(PostStatus.SCHEDULED)),
11→    TRASHED(listOf(PostStatus.TRASHED)),
12→    SEARCH(
13→        listOf(
14→            PostStatus.DRAFT,
15→            PostStatus.PENDING,
16→            PostStatus.PUBLISHED,
17→            PRIVATE,
18→            PostStatus.SCHEDULED,
19→            PostStatus.TRASHED
20→        )
21→    );
22→
23→    val titleResId: Int
24→        get() = when (this) {
25→            PUBLISHED -> R.string.post_list_tab_published_posts
26→            DRAFTS -> R.string.post_list_tab_drafts
27→            SCHEDULED -> R.string.post_list_tab_scheduled_posts
28→            TRASHED -> R.string.post_list_tab_trashed_posts
29→            SEARCH -> 0 // we don't have title for search list
30→        }
31→
32→    companion object {
33→        fun fromPostStatus(status: PostStatus): PostListType {
34→            return when (status) {
35→                PostStatus.PUBLISHED, PRIVATE -> PUBLISHED
36→                PostStatus.DRAFT, PostStatus.PENDING, PostStatus.UNKNOWN -> DRAFTS
37→                PostStatus.TRASHED -> TRASHED
38→                PostStatus.SCHEDULED -> SCHEDULED
39→            }
40→        }
41→    }
42→}

1→package org.wordpress.android.ui.posts
  2→
  3→import android.content.ClipData
  4→import androidx.fragment.app.FragmentActivity
  5→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.model.PostModel
  6→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.model.SiteModel
  7→import org.wordpress.android.push.NativeNotificationsUtils
  8→import org.wordpress.android.ui.ActivityLauncher
  9→import org.wordpress.android.ui.PagePostCreationSourcesDetail.POST_FROM_POSTS_LIST
 10→import org.wordpress.android.ui.blaze.BlazeFeatureUtils
 11→import org.wordpress.android.ui.blaze.BlazeFlowSource
 12→import org.wordpress.android.ui.pages.SnackbarMessageHolder
 13→import org.wordpress.android.ui.photopicker.MediaPickerLauncher
 14→import org.wordpress.android.ui.posts.RemotePreviewLogicHelper.RemotePreviewType
 15→import org.wordpress.android.ui.prefs.AppPrefs
 16→import org.wordpress.android.ui.stories.intro.StoriesIntroDialogFragment
 17→import org.wordpress.android.ui.uploads.UploadService
 18→import org.wordpress.android.util.AppLog
 19→import org.wordpress.android.util.extensions.clipboardManager
 20→import org.wordpress.android.viewmodel.helpers.ToastMessageHolder
 21→
 22→sealed class PostListAction {
 23→    class EditPost(val site: SiteModel, val post: PostModel, val loadAutoSaveRevision: Boolean) : PostListAction()
 24→    class NewPost(val site: SiteModel, val isPromo: Boolean = false) : PostListAction()
 25→    class NewStoryPost(val site: SiteModel) : PostListAction()
 26→    class PreviewPost(
 27→        val site: SiteModel,
 28→        val post: PostModel,
 29→        val triggerPreviewStateUpdate: (PostListRemotePreviewState, PostInfoType) -> Unit,
 30→        val showToast: (ToastMessageHolder) -> Unit,
 31→        val messageMediaUploading: ToastMessageHolder
 32→    ) : PostListAction()
 33→
 34→    class RemotePreviewPost(
 35→        val site: SiteModel,
 36→        val post: PostModel,
 37→        val remotePreviewType: RemotePreviewType
 38→    ) : PostListAction()
 39→
 40→    class RetryUpload(
 41→        val post: PostModel,
 42→        val trackAnalytics: Boolean = PostUtils.isFirstTimePublish(post)
 43→    ) : PostListAction()
 44→
 45→    class CopyUrl(
 46→        val site: SiteModel,
 47→        val post: PostModel,
 48→        val showSnackbar: (SnackbarMessageHolder) -> Unit,
 49→        val messageSuccess: SnackbarMessageHolder,
 50→        val messageError: SnackbarMessageHolder
 51→    ) : PostListAction()
 52→
 53→    class ViewStats(val site: SiteModel, val post: PostModel) : PostListAction()
 54→    class ViewPost(val site: SiteModel, val post: PostModel) : PostListAction()
 55→    class DismissPendingNotification(val pushId: Int) : PostListAction()
 56→
 57→    class ShowPromoteWithBlaze(val post: PostModel) : PostListAction()
 58→}
 59→
 60→@Suppress("TooGenericExceptionCaught", "LongMethod", "ComplexMethod", "LongParameterList")
 61→fun handlePostListAction(
 62→    activity: FragmentActivity,
 63→    action: PostListAction,
 64→    remotePreviewLogicHelper: RemotePreviewLogicHelper,
 65→    previewStateHelper: PreviewStateHelper,
 66→    mediaPickerLauncher: MediaPickerLauncher,
 67→    blazeFeatureUtils: BlazeFeatureUtils
 68→) {
 69→    when (action) {
 70→        is PostListAction.EditPost -> {
 71→            ActivityLauncher.editPostOrPageForResult(activity, action.site, action.post, action.loadAutoSaveRevision)
 72→        }
 73→        is PostListAction.NewPost -> {
 74→            ActivityLauncher.addNewPostForResult(activity, action.site, action.isPromo, POST_FROM_POSTS_LIST, -1, null)
 75→        }
 76→        is PostListAction.NewStoryPost -> {
 77→            if (AppPrefs.shouldShowStoriesIntro()) {
 78→                StoriesIntroDialogFragment.newInstance(action.site)
 79→                    .show(activity.supportFragmentManager, StoriesIntroDialogFragment.TAG)
 80→            } else {
 81→                mediaPickerLauncher.showStoriesPhotoPickerForResultAndTrack(activity, action.site)
 82→            }
 83→        }
 84→        is PostListAction.PreviewPost -> {
 85→            val helperFunctions = previewStateHelper.getUploadStrategyFunctions(activity, action)
 86→            remotePreviewLogicHelper.runPostPreviewLogic(
 87→                activity = activity,
 88→                site = action.site,
 89→                post = action.post,
 90→                helperFunctions = helperFunctions
 91→            )
 92→        }
 93→        is PostListAction.RemotePreviewPost -> {
 94→            ActivityLauncher.previewPostOrPageForResult(activity, action.site, action.post, action.remotePreviewType)
 95→        }
 96→        is PostListAction.RetryUpload -> {
 97→            // restart the UploadService with retry parameters
 98→            val intent = UploadService.getRetryUploadServiceIntent(
 99→                activity,
100→                action.post,
101→                action.trackAnalytics
102→            )
103→            activity.startService(intent)
104→        }
105→        is PostListAction.ViewStats -> {
106→            ActivityLauncher.viewStatsSinglePostDetails(activity, action.site, action.post)
107→        }
108→        is PostListAction.ViewPost -> {
109→            ActivityLauncher.browsePostOrPage(activity, action.site, action.post)
110→        }
111→        is PostListAction.DismissPendingNotification -> {
112→            NativeNotificationsUtils.dismissNotification(action.pushId, activity)
113→        }
114→        is PostListAction.ShowPromoteWithBlaze -> {
115→            blazeFeatureUtils.trackEntryPointTapped(BlazeFlowSource.POSTS_LIST)
116→            ActivityLauncher.openPromoteWithBlaze(activity, action.post, BlazeFlowSource.POSTS_LIST)
117→        }
118→        is PostListAction.CopyUrl -> {
119→            try {
120→                activity.clipboardManager?.setPrimaryClip(
121→                    ClipData.newPlainText("${action.post.id}", action.post.link)
122→                ) ?: throw NullPointerException("ClipboardManager is not supported on this device")
123→
124→                action.showSnackbar.invoke(action.messageSuccess)
125→            } catch (e: Exception) {
126→                /**
127→                 * Ignore any exceptions here as certain devices have bugs and will fail.
128→                 * See https://crrev.com/542cb9cfcc927295615809b0c99917b09a219d9f for more info.
129→                 */
130→                AppLog.e(AppLog.T.POSTS, e)
131→                action.showSnackbar.invoke(action.messageError)
132→            }
133→        }
134→    }
135→}

1→package org.wordpress.android.ui.posts
  2→
  3→import android.os.Bundle
  4→import android.text.TextUtils
  5→import android.view.LayoutInflater
  6→import android.view.View

  8→import android.widget.Button
  9→import android.widget.ProgressBar
 10→import androidx.fragment.app.FragmentActivity
 11→import androidx.lifecycle.ViewModelProvider
 12→import androidx.recyclerview.widget.LinearLayoutManager
 13→import androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView
 14→import org.wordpress.android.R
 15→import org.wordpress.android.WordPress
 16→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.model.SiteModel
 17→import org.wordpress.android.ui.ActionableEmptyView
 18→import org.wordpress.android.ui.ViewPagerFragment
 19→import org.wordpress.android.ui.posts.PostListType.SEARCH
 20→import org.wordpress.android.ui.posts.adapters.PostListAdapter
 21→import org.wordpress.android.ui.utils.UiHelpers
 22→import org.wordpress.android.ui.utils.UiString
 23→import org.wordpress.android.util.DisplayUtils
 24→import org.wordpress.android.util.NetworkUtils
 25→import org.wordpress.android.util.ToastUtils
 26→import org.wordpress.android.util.WPSwipeToRefreshHelper.buildSwipeToRefreshHelper
 27→import org.wordpress.android.util.extensions.getSerializableCompat
 28→import org.wordpress.android.util.extensions.getSerializableExtraCompat
 29→import org.wordpress.android.util.helpers.SwipeToRefreshHelper
 30→import org.wordpress.android.util.image.ImageManager
 31→import org.wordpress.android.util.widgets.CustomSwipeRefreshLayout
 32→import org.wordpress.android.viewmodel.posts.PagedPostList
 33→import org.wordpress.android.viewmodel.posts.PostListEmptyUiState
 34→import org.wordpress.android.viewmodel.posts.PostListItemIdentifier.LocalPostId
 35→import org.wordpress.android.viewmodel.posts.PostListViewModel
 36→import org.wordpress.android.widgets.RecyclerItemDecoration
 37→import javax.inject.Inject
 38→
 39→private const val EXTRA_POST_LIST_TYPE = "post_list_type"
 40→private const val MAX_INDEX_FOR_VISIBLE_ITEM_TO_KEEP_SCROLL_POSITION = 2
 41→
 42→class PostListFragment : ViewPagerFragment() {
 43→    @Inject
 44→    internal lateinit var imageManager: ImageManager
 45→
 46→    @Inject
 47→    internal lateinit var viewModelFactory: ViewModelProvider.Factory
 48→
 49→    @Inject
 50→    internal lateinit var uiHelpers: UiHelpers
 51→    private lateinit var viewModel: PostListViewModel
 52→    private lateinit var mainViewModel: PostListMainViewModel
 53→
 54→    private var swipeToRefreshHelper: SwipeToRefreshHelper? = null
 55→
 56→    private var swipeRefreshLayout: CustomSwipeRefreshLayout? = null
 57→    private var recyclerView: RecyclerView? = null
 58→    private var actionableEmptyView: ActionableEmptyView? = null
 59→    private var progressLoadMore: ProgressBar? = null
 60→
 61→    private lateinit var itemDecorationStandardLayout: RecyclerItemDecoration
 62→
 63→    private lateinit var postListType: PostListType
 64→
 65→    private lateinit var nonNullActivity: FragmentActivity
 66→
 67→    private val postListAdapter: PostListAdapter by lazy {
 68→        PostListAdapter(
 69→            context = nonNullActivity,
 70→            imageManager = imageManager,
 71→            uiHelpers = uiHelpers
 72→        )
 73→    }
 74→
 75→    override fun onCreate(savedInstanceState: Bundle?) {
 76→        super.onCreate(savedInstanceState)
 77→        nonNullActivity = requireActivity()
 78→        (nonNullActivity.application as WordPress).component().inject(this)
 79→
 80→        val nonNullIntent = checkNotNull(nonNullActivity.intent)
 81→        val site = nonNullIntent.getSerializableExtraCompat<SiteModel>(WordPress.SITE)
 82→
 83→        if (site == null) {
 84→            ToastUtils.showToast(nonNullActivity, R.string.blog_not_found, ToastUtils.Duration.SHORT)
 85→            nonNullActivity.finish()
 86→        }
 87→    }
 88→
 89→    override fun getScrollableViewForUniqueIdProvision(): View? {
 90→        if (postListType == SEARCH) {
 91→            return null
 92→        }
 93→        return recyclerView
 94→    }
 95→
 96→    override fun onViewCreated(view: View, savedInstanceState: Bundle?) {
 97→        super.onViewCreated(view, savedInstanceState)
 98→        postListType = requireNotNull(arguments?.getSerializableCompat(EXTRA_POST_LIST_TYPE))
 99→
100→        if (postListType == SEARCH) {
101→            recyclerView?.id = R.id.posts_search_recycler_view_id
102→        }
103→
104→        mainViewModel = ViewModelProvider(nonNullActivity, viewModelFactory)[PostListMainViewModel::class.java]
105→
106→        mainViewModel.authorSelectionUpdated.observe(viewLifecycleOwner) {
107→            if (it != null) {
108→                if (viewModel.updateAuthorFilterIfNotSearch(it)) {
109→                    recyclerView?.scrollToPosition(0)
110→                }
111→            }
112→        }
113→
114→        actionableEmptyView?.updateLayoutForSearch(postListType == SEARCH, 0)
115→
116→        val postListViewModelConnector = mainViewModel.getPostListViewModelConnector(postListType)
117→
118→        viewModel = ViewModelProvider(this, viewModelFactory)[PostListViewModel::class.java]
119→
120→        val displayWidth = DisplayUtils.getWindowPixelWidth(requireContext())
121→        val contentSpacing = nonNullActivity.resources.getDimensionPixelSize(R.dimen.content_margin)
122→
123→        // since the MainViewModel has been already started, we need to manually update the authorFilterSelection value
124→        viewModel.start(
125→            postListViewModelConnector,
126→            mainViewModel.authorSelectionUpdated.value!!,
127→            photonWidth = displayWidth - contentSpacing * 2,
128→            photonHeight = nonNullActivity.resources.getDimensionPixelSize(R.dimen.reader_featured_image_height)
129→        )
130→
131→        initObservers()
132→    }
133→
134→    private fun initObservers() {
135→        if (postListType == SEARCH) {
136→            mainViewModel.searchQuery.observe(viewLifecycleOwner) {
137→                if (TextUtils.isEmpty(it)) {
138→                    postListAdapter.submitList(null)
139→                }
140→                viewModel.search(it)
141→            }
142→        }
143→
144→        viewModel.emptyViewState.observe(viewLifecycleOwner) {
145→            it?.let { emptyViewState -> updateEmptyViewForState(emptyViewState) }
146→        }
147→
148→        viewModel.isFetchingFirstPage.observe(viewLifecycleOwner) {
149→            swipeRefreshLayout?.isRefreshing = it == true
150→        }
151→
152→        viewModel.pagedListData.observe(viewLifecycleOwner) {
153→            it?.let { pagedListData -> updatePagedListData(pagedListData) }
154→        }
155→
156→        viewModel.isLoadingMore.observe(viewLifecycleOwner) {
157→            progressLoadMore?.visibility = if (it == true) View.VISIBLE else View.GONE
158→        }
159→        viewModel.scrollToPosition.observe(viewLifecycleOwner) {
160→            it?.let { index ->
161→                recyclerView?.scrollToPosition(index)
162→            }
163→        }
164→    }
165→
166→    override fun onCreateView(inflater: LayoutInflater, container: ViewGroup?, savedInstanceState: Bundle?): View? {
167→        val view = inflater.inflate(R.layout.post_list_fragment, container, false)
168→
169→        swipeRefreshLayout = view.findViewById(R.id.ptr_layout)
170→        recyclerView = view.findViewById(R.id.recycler_view)
171→        progressLoadMore = view.findViewById(R.id.progress)
172→        actionableEmptyView = view.findViewById(R.id.actionable_empty_view)
173→
174→        val context = nonNullActivity
175→        itemDecorationStandardLayout = RecyclerItemDecoration(
176→            0,
177→            context.resources.getDimensionPixelSize(R.dimen.margin_medium)
178→        )
179→        recyclerView?.layoutManager = LinearLayoutManager(context)
180→        recyclerView?.adapter = postListAdapter
181→        recyclerView?.addItemDecoration(itemDecorationStandardLayout)
182→
183→        swipeRefreshLayout?.let {
184→            swipeToRefreshHelper = buildSwipeToRefreshHelper(it) {
185→                if (!NetworkUtils.isNetworkAvailable(nonNullActivity)) {
186→                    it.isRefreshing = false
187→                } else {
188→                    viewModel.swipeToRefresh()
189→                }
190→            }
191→        }
192→        return view
193→    }
194→
195→    /**
196→     * Updates the data for the adapter while retaining visible item in certain cases.
197→     *
198→     * PagedList tries to keep the visible item by adding new items outside of the screen while modifying the scroll
199→     * position. In most cases, this works out great because it doesn't interrupt to the user. However, after a new
200→     * item is inserted at the top while the list is showing the very first items, it feels very weird to not have the
201→     * inserted item shown. For example, if a new draft is added there is no indication of it except for the flash
202→     * of the scroll bar which is not noticeable unless user is paying attention to it.
203→     *
204→     * In these cases, we try to keep the scroll position the same instead of keeping the visible item the same by
205→     * first saving the state and re-applying it after the data updates are completed. Since `PagedListAdapter` uses
206→     * bg thread to calculate the changes, we need to post the change in the bg thread as well so that it'll be applied
207→     * after changes are reflected.
208→     */
209→    private fun updatePagedListData(pagedListData: PagedPostList) {
210→        val recyclerViewState = recyclerView?.layoutManager?.onSaveInstanceState()
211→        postListAdapter.submitList(pagedListData)
212→        recyclerView?.post {
213→            (recyclerView?.layoutManager as? LinearLayoutManager)?.let { layoutManager ->
214→                if (layoutManager.findFirstVisibleItemPosition() < MAX_INDEX_FOR_VISIBLE_ITEM_TO_KEEP_SCROLL_POSITION) {
215→                    layoutManager.onRestoreInstanceState(recyclerViewState)
216→                }
217→            }
218→        }
219→    }
220→
221→    private fun updateEmptyViewForState(state: PostListEmptyUiState) {
222→        actionableEmptyView?.let { emptyView ->
223→            if (state.emptyViewVisible) {
224→                emptyView.visibility = View.VISIBLE
225→                uiHelpers.setTextOrHide(emptyView.title, state.title)
226→                uiHelpers.setImageOrHide(emptyView.image, state.imgResId)
227→                setupButtonOrHide(emptyView.button, state.buttonText, state.onButtonClick)
228→            } else {
229→                emptyView.visibility = View.GONE
230→            }
231→        }
232→    }
233→
234→    private fun setupButtonOrHide(
235→        buttonView: Button,
236→        text: UiString?,
237→        onButtonClick: (() -> Unit)?
238→    ) {
239→        uiHelpers.setTextOrHide(buttonView, text)
240→        buttonView.setOnClickListener { onButtonClick?.invoke() }
241→    }
242→
243→    fun scrollToTargetPost(localPostId: LocalPostId) {
244→        viewModel.scrollToPost(localPostId)
245→    }
246→
247→    companion object {
248→        const val TAG = "post_list_fragment_tag"
249→
250→        @JvmStatic
251→        fun newInstance(
252→            site: SiteModel,
253→            postListType: PostListType
254→        ): PostListFragment {
255→            val fragment = PostListFragment()
256→            val bundle = Bundle()
257→            bundle.putSerializable(WordPress.SITE, site)
258→            bundle.putSerializable(EXTRA_POST_LIST_TYPE, postListType)
259→            fragment.arguments = bundle
260→            return fragment

In Calypso, to determine if "Duplicate" appears for all not trashed, I should update canShowCopy to `postStatus != TRASHED`. However, scheduling may allow for duplication, while local drafts might create another draft. Currently, copying is allowed for DRAFT and PUBLISHED statuses, including local and remote drafts, but not scheduled ones. Changing this may break existing rules, so I should probably stick with the current visibility rules. There's also a potential bug with the copy URL button being available for drafts. Lastly, promoting with blaze should only happen if eligible and before delete/trash, potentially needing a design adjustment.**Investigating menu item issues**

I think the root cause of the tests could be that a trashed menu item is using the wrong string. We fixed it, but now I need to ensure that the PostActionHandler handles the BUTTON_RESTORE_TO_DRAFTS properly. The analytics tracker string should probably change to "restore" from "restore_to_drafts," but I’m hesitating. There's also the `PostListButtonType.fromInt` used for parsing IDs. In the PostListItemViewHolder, they create the menu item with a unique ID based on buttonType. But I'm worried that using duplicate values could lead to conflicts, especially since value 19 might overlap with earlier enum values.**Reviewing button functionality**

I’m considering the internal functions at play. If `fromInt` is called with the value 19, that might not be referenced correctly. Should we prefer using the existing value 12 for "move to draft"? We've changed the approach for trashed menus, now using BUTTON_RESTORE_TO_DRAFTS with value 19. The PostActionHandler looks fine with the `when (buttonType)` implementation. However, the analytics seem to expect an action `move_to_draft`, which could confuse things. Additionally, I need to update the `PostListButtonType` enum order to insert the new constant before BUTTON_DELETE_PERMANENTLY. I must check and possibly adjust sorting for button types and consider grouping logic properly.**Analyzing publish conditions**

I’m computing whether canPublishPost is true based on several conditions: it’s true if I can retry upload, there’s nothing to upload, or I can’t cancel pending. For scheduled posts, the last condition is false unless there's a local change. So, canPublishPost is false unless there's a local change or it's a local draft. However, if a post is scheduled and has been changed locally, both canPublishPost and canShowPublishButton become true. If those are true, the post will select the appropriate button: either a sync option for locally changed scheduled posts or a publish option. The view/preview button will show up when I can’t retry an upload and the post isn’t trashed. Everything seems on track for the pending status too!**Organizing context menu actions**

I think the requirement to move offline actions to the context menu is about handling cancel pending auto uploads and retries. These might need to be grouped together at the bottom of the drafts tab instead of being spread out. I also have concerns about the icon and color for BUTTON_CANCEL_PENDING_AUTO_UPLOAD. It currently uses an undo icon, while "retry" could benefit from a redo icon with a different color. 

I need to ensure that the PostListActionHandler properly triggers the PreviewPost logic for scheduled posts and that the context menu accurately reflects grouping and ordering. There may be existing tests, but I want to implement these changes carefully to avoid breaking anything. 

Lastly, I need to check for any duplicates for the `button_restore_to_drafts`.

content.text:
Implemented the missing context-menu modernization pieces for Posts:

- Added a dedicated **“Restore to Drafts”** context-menu action (with GB undo icon) for trashed posts.
- Updated action handling + analytics tracking to support the new restore action.
- Fixed **View vs Preview** logic so non-public statuses (Draft/Pending/Scheduled/Unknown) correctly use **Preview** instead of View.
- Added the required new string resource: `button_restore_to_drafts`.

27→fun trackPostListAction(site: SiteModel, buttonType: PostListButtonType, postData: PostModel, statsEvent: Stat) {
28→    val properties = HashMap<String, Any?>()
29→    if (!postData.isLocalDraft) {
30→        properties["post_id"] = postData.remotePostId
31→    }
32→
33→    properties["action"] = when (buttonType) {
34→        BUTTON_EDIT -> {
35→            properties[AnalyticsUtils.HAS_GUTENBERG_BLOCKS_KEY] = PostUtils
36→                .contentContainsGutenbergBlocks(postData.content)
37→            "edit"
38→        }
39→        BUTTON_RETRY -> "retry"
40→        BUTTON_SUBMIT -> "submit"
41→        BUTTON_VIEW -> "view"
42→        BUTTON_PREVIEW -> "preview"
43→        BUTTON_STATS -> "stats"
44→        BUTTON_TRASH -> "trash"
45→        BUTTON_COPY -> "copy"
46→        BUTTON_DELETE,
47→        BUTTON_DELETE_PERMANENTLY -> "delete"
48→        BUTTON_PUBLISH -> "publish"
49→        BUTTON_SYNC -> "sync"
50→        BUTTON_MORE -> "more"
51→        BUTTON_MOVE_TO_DRAFT -> "move_to_draft"
52→        BUTTON_CANCEL_PENDING_AUTO_UPLOAD -> "cancel_pending_auto_upload"
53→        BUTTON_SHOW_MOVE_TRASHED_POST_TO_DRAFT_DIALOG -> "show_move_trashed_post_to_draft_post_dialog"
54→        BUTTON_COPY_URL -> "copy_url"
55→        BUTTON_PROMOTE_WITH_BLAZE -> "promote_with_blaze"
56→    }
57→
58→    AnalyticsUtils.trackWithSiteDetails(statsEvent, site, properties)
59→}

 49→    private val uiHelpers: UiHelpers
 50→) : RecyclerView.ViewHolder(LayoutInflater.from(parent.context).inflate(layout, parent, false)) {
 51→    private val featuredImageView: ImageView = itemView.findViewById(R.id.image_featured)
 52→    private val titleTextView: TextView = itemView.findViewById(R.id.title)
 53→    private val postInfoTextView: TextView = itemView.findViewById(R.id.post_info)
 54→    private val statusesTextView: TextView = itemView.findViewById(R.id.statuses_label)
 55→    private val uploadProgressBar: ProgressBar = itemView.findViewById(R.id.upload_progress)
 56→    private val disabledOverlay: FrameLayout = itemView.findViewById(R.id.disabled_overlay)

 60→

 65→    private val noTitle = UiString.UiStringRes(R.string.untitled_in_parentheses)

 68→     */

 71→    companion object {
 72→        var isClickEnabled = AtomicBoolean(true)
 73→    }
 74→
 75→    abstract fun onBind(item: PostListItemUiState)
 76→
 77→    class Standard(
 78→        parent: ViewGroup,
 79→        imageManager: ImageManager,
 80→        uiHelpers: UiHelpers
 81→    ) : PostListItemViewHolder(R.layout.post_list_item, parent, imageManager, uiHelpers) {
 82→        override fun onBind(item: PostListItemUiState) {
 83→            setBasicValues(item.data)
 84→            setMoreActions(item.moreActions.actions)
 85→
 86→            itemView.setOnClickListener {
 87→                if (isSafeClick(it)) {
 88→                    item.onSelected.invoke()
 89→                }
 90→            }
 91→        }
 92→
 93→        // Purpose of this method is to prevent 2 Editors
 94→        // from being launched simultaneously and then producing a crash
 95→        private fun isSafeClick(view: View): Boolean {
 96→            if (isClickEnabled.getAndSet(false)) {
 97→                view.postDelayed({
 98→                    isClickEnabled.set(true)
 99→                }, 1000)
100→                return true
101→            }
102→            return false
103→        }
104→    }

106→    protected fun setBasicValues(data: PostListItemUiStateData) {
107→        uiHelpers.setTextOrHide(titleTextView, data.title)
108→        uiHelpers.setTextOrHide(excerptTextView, data.excerpt)
109→        updatePostInfoLabel(postInfoTextView, data.postInfo)
110→        uiHelpers.updateVisibility(statusesTextView, data.statuses.isNotEmpty())
111→        updateStatusesLabel(statusesTextView, data.statuses, data.statusesDelimiter, data.statusesColor)
112→        showFeaturedImage(data.imageUrl)
113→        updateProgressBarState(data.progressBarUiState)
114→        uiHelpers.updateVisibility(disabledOverlay, data.showOverlay)
115→        if (data.disableRippleEffect) {
116→            container.background = null
117→        } else {
118→            container.background = selectableBackground
119→        }
120→
121→        if ((data.title != null && data.title != noTitle) && data.excerpt != null) {
122→            titleTextView.maxLines = MAX_TITLE_EXCERPT_LINES
123→            excerptTextView.maxLines = MAX_TITLE_EXCERPT_LINES
124→            titleTextView.viewTreeObserver.addOnPreDrawListener(object : ViewTreeObserver.OnPreDrawListener {
125→                override fun onPreDraw(): Boolean {
126→                    // Remove the listener to avoid multiple callbacks
127→                    titleTextView.viewTreeObserver.removeOnPreDrawListener(this)
128→
129→                    // Get the layout of the title text
130→                    val titleLayout = titleTextView.layout
131→
132→                    // Check if the title occupies more than 2 lines
133→                    when (titleLayout.lineCount) {
134→                        1 -> {
135→                            excerptTextView.maxLines = 2
136→                        }
137→                        else -> {
138→                            excerptTextView.maxLines = 1
139→                            titleTextView.maxLines = 2
140→                        }
141→                    }
142→                    return true
143→                }
144→            })

148→    protected fun setMoreActions(actions: List<PostListItemAction>) {

150→        moreButton.setOnClickListener { onMoreClicked(actions, moreButton) }
151→    }

153→    private fun updatePostInfoLabel(view: TextView, uiStrings: List<UiString>?) {
154→        val concatenatedText = uiStrings?.joinToString(separator = "  ·  ") {
155→            uiHelpers.getTextOfUiString(view.context, it)
156→        }
157→        uiHelpers.setTextOrHide(view, concatenatedText)
158→    }

160→    protected fun onMoreClicked(actions: List<PostListItemAction>, v: View) {
161→        val menu = PopupMenu(v.context, v)
162→        actions.forEach { singleItemAction ->
163→            val menuItem = menu.menu.add(
164→                Menu.NONE,
165→                singleItemAction.buttonType.value,
166→                Menu.NONE,
167→                getMenuItemTitleWithIcon(v.context, singleItemAction)
168→            )
169→            menuItem.setOnMenuItemClickListener {
170→                singleItemAction.onButtonClicked.invoke(singleItemAction.buttonType)
171→                true
172→            }
173→        }
174→        menu.show()
175→    }

177→    private fun updateProgressBarState(progressBarUiState: ProgressBarUiState) {
178→        uiHelpers.updateVisibility(uploadProgressBar, progressBarUiState.visibility)
179→        when (progressBarUiState) {
180→            is ProgressBarUiState.Indeterminate -> uploadProgressBar.isIndeterminate = true
181→            is ProgressBarUiState.Determinate -> {
182→                uploadProgressBar.isIndeterminate = false
183→                uploadProgressBar.progress = progressBarUiState.progress
184→            }
185→            is ProgressBarUiState.Hidden -> Unit // Do nothing
186→        }
187→    }

189→    private fun updateStatusesLabel(
190→        view: TextView,
191→        statuses: List<UiString>,
192→        delimiter: UiString,
193→        @ColorRes color: Int?
194→    ) {
195→        val separator = uiHelpers.getTextOfUiString(view.context, delimiter)
196→        view.text = statuses.joinToString(separator) { uiHelpers.getTextOfUiString(view.context, it) }
197→        color?.let { statusColor ->
198→            view.setTextColor(
199→                ContextCompat.getColor(
200→                    itemView.context,
201→                    statusColor
202→                )
203→            )
204→        }
205→    }

207→    private fun showFeaturedImage(imageUrl: String?) {
208→        if (!imageUrl.isNullOrBlank() && imageUrl == loadedFeaturedImgUrl) {
209→            // Suppress blinking as the media upload progresses
210→            return
211→        }
212→        if (imageUrl.isNullOrBlank()) {
213→            featuredImageView.visibility = View.GONE
214→            imageManager.cancelRequestAndClearImageView(featuredImageView)
215→        } else {
216→            featuredImageView.visibility = View.VISIBLE
217→            imageManager.loadImageWithCorners(
218→                featuredImageView,
219→                ImageType.PHOTO_ROUNDED_CORNERS,
220→                imageUrl,
221→                uiHelpers.getPxOfUiDimen(
222→                    WordPress.getContext(),
223→                    UiDimen.UIDimenRes(R.dimen.my_site_post_item_image_corner_radius)
224→                )
225→            )
226→        }
227→        loadedFeaturedImgUrl = imageUrl
228→    }

230→    private fun setTint(context: Context, drawable: Drawable, color: Int): Drawable {
231→        val wrappedDrawable: Drawable = DrawableCompat.wrap(drawable)
232→        if (color != 0) {
233→            val iconColor = context.getColorFromAttribute(color)
234→            DrawableCompat.setTint(wrappedDrawable, iconColor)
235→        }
236→        return wrappedDrawable
237→    }
238→
239→    @Suppress("ComplexMethod")
240→    private fun getMenuItemTitleWithIcon(context: Context, item: PostListItemAction): SpannableStringBuilder {
241→        var icon: Drawable? = setTint(
242→            context,
243→            ContextCompat.getDrawable(context, item.buttonType.iconResId)!!, item.buttonType.colorAttrId
244→        )
245→        // If there's no icon, we insert a transparent one to keep the title aligned with the items which have icons.
246→        if (icon == null) icon = ColorDrawable(Color.TRANSPARENT)
247→        val iconSize: Int = context.resources.getDimensionPixelSize(R.dimen.menu_item_icon_size)
248→        icon.setBounds(0, 0, iconSize, iconSize)
249→        val imageSpan = ImageSpan(icon)
250→
251→        // Add a space placeholder for the icon, before the title.
252→        val menuTitle = context.getText(item.buttonType.textResId)
253→        val ssb = SpannableStringBuilder(
254→            menuTitle.padStart(menuTitle.length + POST_LIST_ICON_PADDING)
255→        )
256→
257→        // Replace the space placeholder with the icon.
258→        ssb.setSpan(imageSpan, 1, 2, 0)
259→        return ssb
260→    }
261→}

349→                uploadUiState.error.postError,

394→    @Suppress("LongParameterList", "ComplexMethod")
395→    private fun createButtonTypes(
396→        postStatus: PostStatus,
397→        isLocalDraft: Boolean,
398→        isLocallyChanged: Boolean,
399→        uploadUiState: PostUploadUiState,
400→        siteHasCapabilitiesToPublish: Boolean,
401→        statsSupported: Boolean,
402→        shouldShowStatsInJetpackRemovalPhase: Boolean,
403→        shouldShowPromoteWithBlaze: Boolean
404→    ): List<PostListButtonType> {
405→        val canRetryUpload = uploadUiState is UploadFailed
406→        val canCancelPendingAutoUpload = (uploadUiState is UploadWaitingForConnection ||
407→                (uploadUiState is UploadFailed && uploadUiState.isEligibleForAutoUpload))
408→        val canPublishPost = (canRetryUpload || uploadUiState is NothingToUpload || !canCancelPendingAutoUpload) &&
409→                (isLocallyChanged || isLocalDraft || postStatus == DRAFT ||
410→                        (siteHasCapabilitiesToPublish && postStatus == PENDING))
411→
412→        val canShowStats = statsSupported &&
413→                postStatus == PUBLISHED &&
414→                !isLocalDraft &&
415→                !isLocallyChanged &&
416→                shouldShowStatsInJetpackRemovalPhase
417→        val canShowCopy = postStatus == PUBLISHED || postStatus == DRAFT
418→        val canShowCopyUrlButton = !isLocalDraft && postStatus != TRASHED
419→        val canShowViewButton = !canRetryUpload && postStatus != TRASHED
420→        val canShowPublishButton = canRetryUpload || canPublishPost
421→        val buttonTypes = ArrayList<PostListButtonType>()
422→
423→        if (postStatus != TRASHED) {
424→            buttonTypes.add(BUTTON_EDIT)
425→        }
426→
427→        if (canCancelPendingAutoUpload) {
428→            buttonTypes.add(BUTTON_CANCEL_PENDING_AUTO_UPLOAD)
429→        }
430→
431→        if (canShowPublishButton) {
432→            buttonTypes.add(
433→                when {
434→                    canRetryUpload -> BUTTON_RETRY
435→                    !siteHasCapabilitiesToPublish -> BUTTON_SUBMIT
436→                    postStatus == SCHEDULED && isLocallyChanged -> BUTTON_SYNC
437→                    else -> BUTTON_PUBLISH
438→                }
439→            )
440→        }
441→
442→        if (canShowViewButton) {
443→            buttonTypes.addViewOrPreviewAction(isLocalDraft || isLocallyChanged)
444→        }
445→
446→        if (canShowStats) {
447→            buttonTypes.add(BUTTON_STATS)
448→        }
449→
450→        if (canShowCopy) {
451→            buttonTypes.add(BUTTON_COPY)
452→        }
453→
454→        buttonTypes.addMoveToDraftActionIfAvailable(postStatus)
455→
456→        if (canShowCopyUrlButton) {
457→            buttonTypes.add(BUTTON_COPY_URL)
458→        }
459→
460→        if (shouldShowPromoteWithBlaze) {
461→            buttonTypes.add(BUTTON_PROMOTE_WITH_BLAZE)
462→        }
463→
464→        buttonTypes.addDeletingOrTrashAction(isLocalDraft, postStatus)
465→
466→        return buttonTypes
467→    }

36→                PostStatus.DRAFT, PostStatus.PENDING, PostStatus.UNKNOWN -> DRAFTS
37→                PostStatus.TRASHED -> TRASHED
38→                PostStatus.SCHEDULED -> SCHEDULED
39→            }
40→        }
41→    }
42→}

 22→sealed class PostListAction {
 23→    class EditPost(val site: SiteModel, val post: PostModel, val loadAutoSaveRevision: Boolean) : PostListAction()
 24→    class NewPost(val site: SiteModel, val isPromo: Boolean = false) : PostListAction()
 25→    class NewStoryPost(val site: SiteModel) : PostListAction()
 26→    class PreviewPost(
 27→        val site: SiteModel,
 28→        val post: PostModel,
 29→        val triggerPreviewStateUpdate: (PostListRemotePreviewState, PostInfoType) -> Unit,
 30→        val showToast: (ToastMessageHolder) -> Unit,
 31→        val messageMediaUploading: ToastMessageHolder
 32→    ) : PostListAction()
 33→
 34→    class RemotePreviewPost(
 35→        val site: SiteModel,
 36→        val post: PostModel,
 37→        val remotePreviewType: RemotePreviewType
 38→    ) : PostListAction()
 39→
 40→    class RetryUpload(
 41→        val post: PostModel,
 42→        val trackAnalytics: Boolean = PostUtils.isFirstTimePublish(post)
 43→    ) : PostListAction()
 44→
 45→    class CopyUrl(
 46→        val site: SiteModel,
 47→        val post: PostModel,
 48→        val showSnackbar: (SnackbarMessageHolder) -> Unit,
 49→        val messageSuccess: SnackbarMessageHolder,
 50→        val messageError: SnackbarMessageHolder
 51→    ) : PostListAction()
 52→
 53→    class ViewStats(val site: SiteModel, val post: PostModel) : PostListAction()
 54→    class ViewPost(val site: SiteModel, val post: PostModel) : PostListAction()
 55→    class DismissPendingNotification(val pushId: Int) : PostListAction()
 56→
 57→    class ShowPromoteWithBlaze(val post: PostModel) : PostListAction()
 58→}
 59→
 60→@Suppress("TooGenericExceptionCaught", "LongMethod", "ComplexMethod", "LongParameterList")
 61→fun handlePostListAction(
 62→    activity: FragmentActivity,
 63→    action: PostListAction,
 64→    remotePreviewLogicHelper: RemotePreviewLogicHelper,
 65→    previewStateHelper: PreviewStateHelper,
 66→    mediaPickerLauncher: MediaPickerLauncher,
 67→    blazeFeatureUtils: BlazeFeatureUtils
 68→) {
 69→    when (action) {
 70→        is PostListAction.EditPost -> {
 71→            ActivityLauncher.editPostOrPageForResult(activity, action.site, action.post, action.loadAutoSaveRevision)
 72→        }
 73→        is PostListAction.NewPost -> {
 74→            ActivityLauncher.addNewPostForResult(activity, action.site, action.isPromo, POST_FROM_POSTS_LIST, -1, null)
 75→        }
 76→        is PostListAction.NewStoryPost -> {
 77→            if (AppPrefs.shouldShowStoriesIntro()) {
 78→                StoriesIntroDialogFragment.newInstance(action.site)
 79→                    .show(activity.supportFragmentManager, StoriesIntroDialogFragment.TAG)
 80→            } else {
 81→                mediaPickerLauncher.showStoriesPhotoPickerForResultAndTrack(activity, action.site)
 82→            }
 83→        }
 84→        is PostListAction.PreviewPost -> {
 85→            val helperFunctions = previewStateHelper.getUploadStrategyFunctions(activity, action)
 86→            remotePreviewLogicHelper.runPostPreviewLogic(
 87→                activity = activity,
 88→                site = action.site,
 89→                post = action.post,
 90→                helperFunctions = helperFunctions
 91→            )
 92→        }
 93→        is PostListAction.RemotePreviewPost -> {
 94→            ActivityLauncher.previewPostOrPageForResult(activity, action.site, action.post, action.remotePreviewType)
 95→        }
 96→        is PostListAction.RetryUpload -> {
 97→            // restart the UploadService with retry parameters
 98→            val intent = UploadService.getRetryUploadServiceIntent(
 99→                activity,
100→                action.post,
101→                action.trackAnalytics
102→            )
103→            activity.startService(intent)
104→        }
105→        is PostListAction.ViewStats -> {
106→            ActivityLauncher.viewStatsSinglePostDetails(activity, action.site, action.post)
107→        }
108→        is PostListAction.ViewPost -> {
109→            ActivityLauncher.browsePostOrPage(activity, action.site, action.post)
110→        }
111→        is PostListAction.DismissPendingNotification -> {
112→            NativeNotificationsUtils.dismissNotification(action.pushId, activity)
113→        }
114→        is PostListAction.ShowPromoteWithBlaze -> {
115→            blazeFeatureUtils.trackEntryPointTapped(BlazeFlowSource.POSTS_LIST)
116→            ActivityLauncher.openPromoteWithBlaze(activity, action.post, BlazeFlowSource.POSTS_LIST)
117→        }
118→        is PostListAction.CopyUrl -> {
119→            try {
120→                activity.clipboardManager?.setPrimaryClip(
121→                    ClipData.newPlainText("${action.post.id}", action.post.link)
122→                ) ?: throw NullPointerException("ClipboardManager is not supported on this device")
123→
124→                action.showSnackbar.invoke(action.messageSuccess)
125→            } catch (e: Exception) {
126→                /**
127→                 * Ignore any exceptions here as certain devices have bugs and will fail.
128→                 * See https://crrev.com/542cb9cfcc927295615809b0c99917b09a219d9f for more info.
129→                 */
130→                AppLog.e(AppLog.T.POSTS, e)
131→                action.showSnackbar.invoke(action.messageError)
132→            }
133→        }
134→    }
135→}

122→

146→        }

149→            swipeRefreshLayout?.isRefreshing = it == true
150→        }
151→

153→            it?.let { pagedListData -> updatePagedListData(pagedListData) }
154→        }

158→        }

166→    override fun onCreateView(inflater: LayoutInflater, container: ViewGroup?, savedInstanceState: Bundle?): View? {
167→        val view = inflater.inflate(R.layout.post_list_fragment, container, false)
168→
169→        swipeRefreshLayout = view.findViewById(R.id.ptr_layout)
170→        recyclerView = view.findViewById(R.id.recycler_view)
171→        progressLoadMore = view.findViewById(R.id.progress)
172→        actionableEmptyView = view.findViewById(R.id.actionable_empty_view)
173→
174→        val context = nonNullActivity
175→        itemDecorationStandardLayout = RecyclerItemDecoration(
176→            0,
177→            context.resources.getDimensionPixelSize(R.dimen.margin_medium)
178→        )
179→        recyclerView?.layoutManager = LinearLayoutManager(context)
180→        recyclerView?.adapter = postListAdapter
181→        recyclerView?.addItemDecoration(itemDecorationStandardLayout)
182→
183→        swipeRefreshLayout?.let {
184→            swipeToRefreshHelper = buildSwipeToRefreshHelper(it) {
185→                if (!NetworkUtils.isNetworkAvailable(nonNullActivity)) {
186→                    it.isRefreshing = false
187→                } else {
188→                    viewModel.swipeToRefresh()
189→                }
190→            }
191→        }
192→        return view
193→    }
194→
195→    /**
196→     * Updates the data for the adapter while retaining visible item in certain cases.
197→     *
198→     * PagedList tries to keep the visible item by adding new items outside of the screen while modifying the scroll
199→     * position. In most cases, this works out great because it doesn't interrupt to the user. However, after a new
200→     * item is inserted at the top while the list is showing the very first items, it feels very weird to not have the
201→     * inserted item shown. For example, if a new draft is added there is no indication of it except for the flash
202→     * of the scroll bar which is not noticeable unless user is paying attention to it.
203→     *
204→     * In these cases, we try to keep the scroll position the same instead of keeping the visible item the same by
205→     * first saving the state and re-applying it after the data updates are completed. Since `PagedListAdapter` uses
206→     * bg thread to calculate the changes, we need to post the change in the bg thread as well so that it'll be applied
207→     * after changes are reflected.
208→     */
209→    private fun updatePagedListData(pagedListData: PagedPostList) {
210→        val recyclerViewState = recyclerView?.layoutManager?.onSaveInstanceState()
211→        postListAdapter.submitList(pagedListData)
212→        recyclerView?.post {
213→            (recyclerView?.layoutManager as? LinearLayoutManager)?.let { layoutManager ->
214→                if (layoutManager.findFirstVisibleItemPosition() < MAX_INDEX_FOR_VISIBLE_ITEM_TO_KEEP_SCROLL_POSITION) {
215→                    layoutManager.onRestoreInstanceState(recyclerViewState)
216→                }
217→            }
218→        }
219→    }
220→
221→    private fun updateEmptyViewForState(state: PostListEmptyUiState) {
222→        actionableEmptyView?.let { emptyView ->
223→            if (state.emptyViewVisible) {
224→                emptyView.visibility = View.VISIBLE
225→                uiHelpers.setTextOrHide(emptyView.title, state.title)
226→                uiHelpers.setImageOrHide(emptyView.image, state.imgResId)
227→                setupButtonOrHide(emptyView.button, state.buttonText, state.onButtonClick)
228→            } else {
229→                emptyView.visibility = View.GONE
230→            }
231→        }
232→    }
233→
234→    private fun setupButtonOrHide(
235→        buttonView: Button,
236→        text: UiString?,
237→        onButtonClick: (() -> Unit)?
238→    ) {
239→        uiHelpers.setTextOrHide(buttonView, text)
240→        buttonView.setOnClickListener { onButtonClick?.invoke() }
241→    }

243→    fun scrollToTargetPost(localPostId: LocalPostId) {
244→        viewModel.scrollToPost(localPostId)
245→    }

257→            bundle.putSerializable(WordPress.SITE, site)
258→            bundle.putSerializable(EXTRA_POST_LIST_TYPE, postListType)
259→            fragment.arguments = bundle
260→            return fragment

 78→    }

118→    val isLoadingMore: LiveData<Boolean> = _isLoadingMore

121→    val isFetchingFirstPage: LiveData<Boolean> = _isFetchingFirstPage

133→    fun start(
134→        postListViewModelConnector: PostListViewModelConnector,
135→        value: AuthorFilterSelection,
136→        photonWidth: Int,
137→        photonHeight: Int
138→    ) {
139→        if (isStarted) {
140→            return
141→        }
142→        this.photonHeight = photonHeight
143→        this.photonWidth = photonWidth
144→        connector = postListViewModelConnector
145→
146→        isStarted = true
147→        lifecycleOwner.lifecycleRegistry.currentState = Lifecycle.State.STARTED
148→
149→        if (connector.postListType == SEARCH) {
150→            this.authorFilterSelection = EVERYONE
151→        } else {
152→            this.authorFilterSelection = value
153→            /*
154→             * We don't want to initialize the list with empty search query in search mode as it'd send an unnecessary
155→             * request to fetch ids of all posts on the site.
156→             */
157→            initList(dataSource, lifecycleOwner.lifecycle)
158→        }
159→    }

161→    private fun initList(dataSource: PostListItemDataSource, lifecycle: Lifecycle) {
162→        val listDescriptor: PostListDescriptor = initListDescriptor(searchQuery)
163→
164→        clearLiveDataSources()
165→
166→        val pagedListWrapper = listStore.getList(listDescriptor, dataSource, lifecycle)
167→
168→        listenToEmptyViewStateLiveData(pagedListWrapper)
169→
170→        _pagedListData.addSource(pagedListWrapper.data) { pagedPostList ->
171→            pagedPostList?.let {
172→                if (isSearchResultDeliverable()) {
173→                    onDataUpdated(it)
174→                    _pagedListData.value = it
175→                }
176→            }
177→        }
178→        _isFetchingFirstPage.addSource(pagedListWrapper.isFetchingFirstPage) {
179→            searchProgressJob?.cancel()
180→            if (it == true) {
181→                val delay = if (connector.postListType != SEARCH) {
182→                    0
183→                } else {
184→                    SEARCH_PROGRESS_INDICATOR_DELAY_MS
185→                }
186→                searchProgressJob = launch {
187→                    delay(delay)
188→                    searchProgressJob = null
189→                    if (isActive) {
190→                        _isFetchingFirstPage.value = true
191→                    }
192→                }
193→            } else {
194→                _isFetchingFirstPage.value = false
195→            }
196→        }
197→        _isLoadingMore.addSource(pagedListWrapper.isLoadingMore) {
198→            _isLoadingMore.value = it
199→        }
200→
201→        this.pagedListWrapper = pagedListWrapper
202→        fetchFirstPage()
203→    }
204→
205→    private fun clearLiveDataSources() {
206→        pagedListWrapper?.let {
207→            _pagedListData.removeSource(it.data)
208→            _emptyViewState.removeSource(pagedListData)
209→            _emptyViewState.removeSource(it.isEmpty)
210→            _emptyViewState.removeSource(it.isFetchingFirstPage)
211→            _emptyViewState.removeSource(it.listError)
212→            _isFetchingFirstPage.removeSource(it.isFetchingFirstPage)
213→            _isLoadingMore.removeSource(it.isLoadingMore)
214→        }
215→    }

217→    private fun initListDescriptor(searchQuery: String?): PostListDescriptor {
218→        return if (connector.site.isUsingWpComRestApi) {
219→            val author: AuthorFilter = when (authorFilterSelection) {
220→                ME -> SpecificAuthor(accountStore.account.userId)
221→                EVERYONE -> Everyone
222→            }
223→
224→            PostListDescriptorForRestSite(
225→                site = connector.site,
226→                statusList = connector.postListType.postStatuses,
227→                author = author,
228→                searchQuery = searchQuery,
229→                order = if (connector.postListType == SCHEDULED) ListOrder.ASC else ListOrder.DESC
230→            )
231→        } else {
232→            PostListDescriptorForXmlRpcSite(
233→                site = connector.site,
234→                statusList = connector.postListType.postStatuses,
235→                searchQuery = searchQuery,
236→                order = if (connector.postListType == SCHEDULED) ListOrder.ASC else ListOrder.DESC
237→            )
238→        }
239→    }
240→
241→    private fun listenToEmptyViewStateLiveData(pagedListWrapper: PagedListWrapper<PostListItemType>) {
242→        val update = {
243→            createEmptyUiState(
244→                postListType = connector.postListType,
245→                isNetworkAvailable = networkUtilsWrapper.isNetworkAvailable(),
246→                isLoadingData = pagedListWrapper.isFetchingFirstPage.value ?: false ||
247→                        pagedListWrapper.data.value == null,
248→                isListEmpty = pagedListWrapper.isEmpty.value ?: true,
249→                isSearchPromptRequired = isEmptySearch(),
250→                error = pagedListWrapper.listError.value,
251→                fetchFirstPage = this::fetchFirstPage,
252→                newPost = connector.postActionHandler::newPost
253→            )
254→        }
255→
256→        _emptyViewState.addSource(pagedListWrapper.isEmpty) { _emptyViewState.postValue(update()) }
257→        _emptyViewState.addSource(pagedListWrapper.isFetchingFirstPage) { _emptyViewState.postValue(update()) }
258→        _emptyViewState.addSource(pagedListWrapper.listError) { _emptyViewState.postValue(update()) }
259→    }
